llmstxt-sites.name: Sites with llms.txt
llmstxt-sites.description: These sites serve a valid /llms.txt. The crawler should discover URLs from it and generate structured output.

sites.notes: Baseline — must pass. Docs, Blog, Learn sections.
Links to .md files — low confidence expected.
Very large site, may timeout on extraction.

sitemap-sites.name: Sites with sitemap, no llms.txt
sitemap-sites.description: These sites have no /llms.txt but serve a /sitemap.xml. The crawler should fall through to sitemap discovery.

sites.notes: No robots.txt, direct sitemap probe. Multi-language.

noinfo-sites.name: No llms.txt, no sitemap (spider fallback)
noinfo-sites.description: These sites have neither /llms.txt nor /sitemap.xml. The spider BFS crawler should discover pages by following links.

sites.notes: Birthplace of the web, ~100 pages by BFS.
Personal site, ~7 pages with multiple sections.
Large government site, spider bounded by config.
